tasks.label: RFMONO: Deploy to EdgeTX simulator SD
tasks.command:
$sdRoot = '${config:rfmono.simulatorSdRoot}'
if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $sdRoot)) { throw "Simulator SD root not found: $sdRoot" }
$target = Join-Path -Path $sdRoot -ChildPath 'SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY'
$targetProject = Join-Path -Path $target -ChildPath 'RFMONO'
$targetSoundsRoot = Join-Path -Path $sdRoot -ChildPath 'SOUNDS\en'
$targetSounds = Join-Path -Path $targetSoundsRoot -ChildPath 'RFMONO'
$oldTargetLib = Join-Path -Path $target -ChildPath 'lib'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $target | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $targetSoundsRoot | Out-Null
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY\RFMONO.lua' -Destination (Join-Path -Path $target -ChildPath 'RFMONO.lua') -Force
if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $targetProject) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $targetProject -Recurse -Force }
if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $oldTargetLib) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $oldTargetLib -Recurse -Force }
if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $targetSounds) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $targetSounds -Recurse -Force }
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SCRIPTS\TELEMETRY\RFMONO' -Destination $targetProject -Recurse -Force
Copy-Item -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\SOUNDS\en\RFMONO' -Destination $targetSounds -Recurse -Force
Write-Host "RFMONO scripts deployed to $target"
Write-Host "RFMONO sounds deployed to $targetSounds"
